_doc: Single source of truth for stop-hook detectors. Read by run_all.py (Python), work_checks.js (JS), and validated against detectors.sh (bash). Adding a detector = add an entry here, write the python module, and re-run the registry-validator. The persist-line bug that silently disabled COMMENT_BLOAT for hours was caused by the 3-place-update model this registry replaces.

_schema.name: snake_case detector identifier (matches python module + verdict-line key)
_schema.fires_when: the verdict string the python detector prints when violation found (the bash variable equals this when firing); 'ok' otherwise
_schema.bash_var: UPPER_SNAKE bash variable name in detectors.sh
_schema.deny: true => work_checks.js adds to FIRING_RULES (causes ctx.deny); false => detected-only
_schema.reason_key: key into work_checks.js REASONS object (only when deny=true)
_schema.scope: where the detector applies, e.g. stop-hook, transcript, changed-files
_schema.owning_invariant: stable doctrine/invariant/devlog reference protected by this detector
_schema.fixture_path: project-root-relative fixture path or list of paths
_schema.fixture_waiver: optional waiver object; requires review_date and reason
_schema.outage_link: optional devlog, KB, issue, or incident path
_schema.review_date: required ISO date when fixture_waiver is present

detectors.name: scope_stacked
detectors._note: shipped 2026-05-10 advisory, promoted to deny same day after firing correctly on the very turn that named the problem. Catches enumerate-without-tick the existing phrase detectors miss.

fixture_waiver.reason: covered by runtime/state-driven integration checks, not static transcript fixture

detectors.name: evasion_intent
detectors._note: shipped 2026-05-10 as deny. Scans assistant thinking blocks for explicit gate-evasion language (avoid the structural check, frame in prose to bypass, stay under the threshold, to avoid exhaust_check, etc.). The structural answer to the catastrophic failure where the agent thinks about routing around its own gates and shapes the output to fall just under the threshold.

fixture_waiver.reason: covered by runtime/state-driven integration checks, not static transcript fixture

detectors.why: Protects thinking-blocks against evasion intent failures.

detectors.name: boyscout_clean
detectors._note: shipped 2026-05-12. Checks LOC + comment-bloat + char-spam on edited files. Fires on any violation.

fixture_waiver.reason: covered by runtime/state-driven integration checks, not static transcript fixture

detectors.why: Protects changed-files against boyscout clean failures.
